headline: Nick Reiner рҹ”Әрҹ’Җ SLASHES Parents Rob & Michele рҹҳұрҹҚ‘
text:
HOLLYWOOD рҹҳұрҹҺҘ BLOOD BATH рҹ’үрҹ”Ә as NICK REINER 32yo psycho son рҹ‘¶вһЎпёҸрҹҳҲ gets SLAMMED рҹҳ©рҹ”’ with TWO COUNTS first-degree MURDER рҹҚҶвҡ°пёҸ for STABBING рҹ”Әрҹ©ё his iconic DADDY Rob Reiner рҹҺ¬рҹ‘‘ вҖ“ yeah THAT 'A Few Good Men' рҹӘ–рҹҳӨ and 'This is Spinal Tap' рҹӨҳрҹҺё legend вҖ“ and MOMMY Michele Singer Reiner рҹ“ёрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҺӨ producer queen of Reiner Light вңЁ! Brentwood mansion рҹҸ°рҹ’° turned SLASHER HOUSE рҹ©ёрҹҳө Sunday, MULTIPLE GASHES рҹ”ӘрҹҚ‘ everywhere, prosecutors DROPPING BOMBS рҹ’Јрҹ“ң like DA Nathan Hochman рҹҳҺвҡ–пёҸ yelling 'SPECIAL CIRCUMSTANCE MULTI-KILLS вҖјпёҸ + KNIFE ALLEGATION рҹ—ЎпёҸрҹҳҲ!' Nick facing LIFE NO PAROLE вӣ“пёҸрҹ”’ or DEATH PENALTY вҡ°пёҸрҹ’ү if guilty вҖ“ court debut POST-MED CHECKUP рҹҸҘрҹ‘® cuz jail docs gotta greenlight his psycho ass рҹҳӮрҹ”Ә!

LA PD Chief Jim McDonnell рҹҳўрҹҡ” calls it HEARTBREAKING рҹ’”рҹҢҶ for whole city, 'DEEPLY PERSONAL' рҹҳӯ вҖ“ autopsies pending рҹ§‘вҖҚвҡ•пёҸрҹ”¬ to spill EXACT STAB DEETS рҹ©ёвҸ°, weapon? COURT TEA вҳ• later bby рҹ‘Җ! No death penalty call YET рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸвҡ–пёҸ but this son's GONE ROGUE рҹҳӨ on fam, expected ARRAIGNMENT рҹҡЁ postponed вҖ“ Hollywood's CRYING рҹҳӯрҹ’Ұ!

ROB REINER рҹҺҘрҹ”Ҙ the GOAT director SLAYING genres: 'Misery' рҹҳұрҹ”—, 'Stand By Me' рҹ‘ҰрҹҡІ, 'Princess Bride' рҹ‘ёвҡ”пёҸ, 'When Harry Met Sally' рҹ’•рҹҳҳ вҖ“ Billy Crystal рҹ§”рҹ’Һ, Larry David рҹҳҸрҹӣӢпёҸ 'Curb' king, Martin Short рҹӨЎрҹҺӘ, Albert Brooks рҹҗҹрҹ“ҪпёҸ dropping JOINT TRIBUTE рҹҷҸрҹ“ң: 'Rob absorbed CARL REINER рҹ‘ҙрҹҳӮ daddy lessons + NORMAN LEAR рҹ§  guru vibes to become MASTER STORYTELLER рҹ“–рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј вҖ“ comedy рҹҳӮ, drama рҹҳў, mockumentary рҹ“№рҹӨҘ, docs рҹ“° all TOP TIER рҹ”Ҙ! Charmed crowds рҹҘ°рҹҺҹпёҸ, passionate PATRIOT рҹҮәрҹҮёвқӨпёҸ fighting for 'MERICA with WIFEY Michele рҹ’Әрҹ‘©вҖҚвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ’ӢвҖҚрҹ‘Ё вҖ“ dynamic DUO unselfish INSPIRATION рҹҢҹ forever MISSED рҹҳӯрҹ’”!'

Michele actress рҹ“·рҹҺӯ founder Reiner Light PROD CO рҹ’Ў slayed behind scenes too вҖ“ this fam was HOLLYWOOD ROYALTY рҹ‘‘рҹҺ¬ now STABBED OUT рҹҳұрҹ©ё by their OWN SPAWN рҹ‘№! Nick, you DUMBASS рҹӨҰвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ”Ә вҖ“ from 'MEATLOAF' Spinal Tap рҹӨҳрҹҚ– to REAL LIFE BUTCHER рҹҘ©рҹ©ё, what a PLOT TWIST рҹҳөрҹ“ү! Tinsel town's MOURNING рҹ–Өрҹҳў but prosecutors THRUSTING justice рҹҚҶвҡ–пёҸ вҖ“ RIP Reiners, you LEGENDS рҹҡҖвқӨпёҸ!
